THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCINTOSH, DAVID B., AKA DAVID MCINTOSH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 217 EDDY STREET, #614, SAN FRANCISCO,CALIFORNIA $989.25 RENT, $270.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $215.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,474.25, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
